creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
To be clear, I do not mind having a default vimrc file as long as it is sane and non-intrusive.  vim _sample_ vimrc file is not a good default vimrc file.

Also, as Adrian says, the default file should be installed in ${PREFIX}/etc/.

Pity that the change was supposedly "requested by many" but there was no public discussion of what is actually being requested.
